Review 1: rating 5.0. Best healing stick When you're allergic to neosporin and band aids it's hard to heal any wound. I have tried other alternatives to Neosporin, etc that are far too oily, carry a heady odor, or are simply ineffective. My Boo-Boo stick arrived promptly with a handwritten note from the seller, and after several applications to trouble spots on my skin, there has definitely been improvement in comfort...

reference_output: rating 5.0. This is the best stuff ever! I've always liked using products made by nature more than using man-made things full of chemicals, so I tried the boo-boo stick.  It's wonderful.  I'm a menace to myself in the kitchen, give me a sharp knife and I'll cut my finger every time.  I had a severe cut that kept bleeding and hurt a lot,  and I tried bandaids, peroxide, liquid bandage, Neosporin and everything else I could think of.  Finally I tried this boo-boo stick, and it worked.  The pain went away and the cut began to heal.  I can't say enough good about this stuff, and it's also great that it's all natural and made by a small business owner.  Try it, I think you'll love it as much as I do.  Mother Nature strikes again, and She is awesome.

rating 5.0. Would I buy again? I already have! I bought six of these rings (total) months and months and months ago in two different sizes, and one by one I lost them all with so much sadness because I loved them so much! Until I lost the last one they were shiny, comfortable, no bends at all even though I do a LOT of crafting and have 2 toddlers, so these can really hold up!!!

So when I had a little extra cash recently I knew I wanted to replinish my set, and ordered another 6 (total), and then contacted the seller as the listing only went up to size 11, so they worked with me to do another order of 9 more (total) rings, including 3 at size 11.5...

These are seriously my favorite, I wear them anytime I go out, and now that I am pregnant and my wedding rings don't fit I wear 3 on my ring finger just at all times. I've worn them everyday since the order and my finger and rings still look new, no discoloration of the rings at all, or any green on my fingers.

I'm so happy with the product and the seller/maker, I will definitely be buying from them again, hopefully something new and not just more replacements for lost rings LOL

Review 2: rating 5.0. Packs a punch Wow these are potent! Just what I needed to help with sinuses. One tablet lasts beyond my 10 minute shower. Added bonus is I feel all my pores have opened up too!

Review 3: rating 5.0. A wonderful relief I ordered these shower tabs to give them a try. I am so impressed with them. The scent is strong as soon as you open the box you can smell them. I used the first tab when I had a sinus infection and I felt relief right away. These are strong enough to use their suggestion of using half a tab which I will do next time. It was also really nice to get a sample of a different scent with my order.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Relief for cold sypmtoms The product is great...it really does give a swift kick to your cold symptoms!  The packaging is high quality, which is important for this type of product. Delivery was quick.

Review 5: rating 5.0. Refreshing Love this, great scent and really helps open sinuses

Review 6: rating 5.0. Wonderful scent Love these shower steamers. Perfect scent to relieve sinus pressure due to allergies.

Review 7: rating 4.0. It's okau Really does help my headaches and allergies and sinuses but I do wish it was a little stronger smelling and lasted a little longer in the shower.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Love the smell Love the smell of these shower steamers. Even my husband said he really likes them. We did cut ours smaller because they do last longer than our showers.

Review 9: rating 5.0. Spa-like Shower Smelled great and really helped me feel better! I struggle with allergies and after a good steam shower with these tablets I felt amazing. Also loved the free sample pack that was a surprise that came with it! Great product!

Review 10: rating 5.0. Obsessed with these These are a home run. The one star reviews have me perplexed because the scent of the eucalyptus and peppermint is so strong it literally has a cooling effect, I can feel it in my eyes it’s so strong (in a good way lol)! I was so sick- getting super congested and having headaches and these did the trick. The one star reviews say things like “they didn’t work”  - first of all, these aren’t medicine. They cannot magically decongest you. The essential oils in combina...

Review 11: rating 5.0. Great shower steamers Smells great and perfect for clearing your head. They also sent me a sample of another scent which I’m excited to try!

Review 12: rating 5.0. These smell AMAZING I’ve ordered these now 3 different times in 3 weeks bc they work SO WELL AND SMELL AMAZING! I’ve used for my 6,3,2 year old in their baths every night for 7 days straight when we all had a horrible cold. My mom caught it and I got a pack for her and one for me and my husband. I also got the morning wake twice also. Highly recommend best ones I’ve found

Review 13: rating 5.0. Works good Amazing! Works great to clear sinuses and relaxing.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Very refreshing I do like them but they only last for one shower,bsomenof the other reviews said that they last tow to three showers thatnis not the case with me.

Review 15: rating 5.0. Cant recommend them enough! I don’t write reviews but often but I had to for these. I love them so much! Even if you don’t have a cold, these are amazing especially if you have allergies. The peppermint and eucalyptus scent is great and strong in a good way. It really feels like it opens your sinuses and the scent is relaxing for me. Cant recommend them enough!

Review 16: rating 5.0. Beyond! These tablets have exceeded my expectations. Great for the morning showers to clear the mind and sinuses. Also great for the night showers. They’ve Also sent 2 complimentary tablets. Greatness!

Review 17: rating 3.0. Confused My husband is very conjested in the morning, so I heard about these tablets to help with this.  First, they are not cheap; however, after seeing all the five star reviews, felt these would definately do the trick.  The company included two free tablets (that was nice).  They smelled good and my husband and I were excited to use them.  Followed the instructions to the tee.  It did fill the house with a great smell; however, my husband said they did absolutely nothing for his ...

Review 18: rating 5.0. You don’t need a lot I really like this one, you can cut in quarters and honestly that’s just what I need and the scent lasts longer in the bathroom! Will definitely buy again!

Review 19: rating 5.0. BEST Shower Fizz Look, I've tried shower fizzies you can buy from the local store including the brand that starts with V and ends with ick's. This thing BLOWS all those away, the scent filled the entire bathroom and really helped to clear up my sinuses. I would give this a 5/5! --they also sent my a free gift that was 2 headache shower fizzies which I really appreciated. Great company and quality.

Review 20: rating 5.0. Lifesaver! I bought these last week since me and my daughter are both battling colds. I had used shower steamers before and was unimpressed, but figured I would give these a try. They worked like a charm for both of us. We both noticed improvement in our congestion and were able to sleep so much better after using these. I highly recommend them, and will definitely be buying again!
reference_output: rating 5.0. Fantastic product, typically lasts for two showers per tablet. I'm a guy, and I don't do foofy stuff... but I was having a really difficult time clearing my sinuses. Necessity drove me to try this and... WOW! Then my wife tried it and well, I know there will be many repeat orders moving forward. Aroma is powerful, it's like showing in VapoRub but WAY better smelling (and I'm a fan of Vick's).

reference_output:
rating 1.0. Horrible workmanship. It certainly does not look like the one from advertising photo. after looking at the photos at the amazon page, I ordered 7" size, hammered nugold bracelet.

However, what I received was completely different than what it was described & advertised in amazon.
I asked for 7", but they sent me 7.5" which is too big for my wrist.
also, the biggest problem was "hammered" style. As you can see from attached photo from the website, the hammered NuGold looks very nice and unique, however, what I received was looking more like "un-finished, scratch & bent, gold surface" bracelet.
It wasn't hammered properly like their advertising photo, nor shinny & cleanly finished.

Honestly, very disappointed at their workmanship.
UPDATE : JUNE 27, 2018
I have contacted the seller about this issue with the photos and explanation. They asked me to return the item. They have issued the return label, but I had to pay for the shipping back cost which I thought it was bit unfair. The item was received couple of days ago, but they have not contacted me back nor replied back on my email. So, I have contacted Amazon. Fortunately, after checking the communication between me and the seller, Amazon immediately gave me the refund. IT IS GREAT BEING AMAZON PRIME MEMBER !!!!

persona: This customer seeks simple, fun, and lighthearted games that offer quick enjoyment and are easy to learn, especially for families with young children; they value spontaneity in purchasing and are drawn to games that deliver immediate entertainment through luck-based mechanics.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Perfect for Gift Giving This is the perfect gift for all ages. Generations of our family play this fun, super easy and competitive game. I purchased the medium one for our houseboat. It makes the perfect after dinner game for the whole family. The workmanship and construction is first rate - we love that it is made in the USA! Penny Drop is the perfect unplugged game that everyone will love to play. Review 2: rating 5.0. Wooden penny drop game - we love wooden games. The small wooden penny drop game arrived.....good looking wooden box game - should be fun for Thanksgiving and Christmas 2020. Great for 1 - ? players. Only down side - no instructions - found and printed some online.......
I would purchase again. Review 3: rating 5.0. Great little game easy to learn. easy to play. easy to carry with you to a friend's house. Just love this game. Give this game a try. The kids will love playing it also. We are having a great time playing. I just ordered 2 more for Christmas gifts. Will be ordering more after Christmas. Review 4: rating 3.0. Needs something to secure it closed My family has bought 3 of these games. This game is fun and well made as far as sturdiness goes. Unfortunately, it has. I magnetic closure or fastening device to keep it closed. The bottom and the dice could easily fall out. Imagine if you also wanted to keep some pennies stored inside as well. It’s the only real downfall. Review 5: rating 4.0. Fun, easy family game A very fun dice game appropriate for all ages. The game is in a nicely designed wooden box that you can actually add two rolls of pennies for an added gift.
Negative: Amazon raising the price of the same game/same size by $8 two weeks after I bought the first game. Not cool. Review 6: rating 5.0. We Love This Game This is a fun party game for all ages this game has brought us so much joy doing these times Review 7: rating 5.0. Fun, easy game. This is a really simple, fun game that we've played with 8 year old's and up. All you need is a bunch of pennies ... 10 to 12 per player. The instructions are clear and you can be playing in minutes. A few rounds and you got the idea! For a little extra excitement when we play with the adults, we each toss a quarter in the box and the winner takes the pot. Review 8: rating 4.0. Slight design challenge We had never played this game but it sounded fun so we gave it a try. It’s cute and easy and the box is nice -the reason for 4-stars is that we don’t like how you can’t lift the game box without the whole lid (box top) coming off. I store it in a zip top bag to make it easier to pick up and transport. Maybe a sliding lid design would be better? Review 9: rating 1.0. Very disappointed Can't give zero star rating. Very disappointed, item was out for delivery and then then carrier returned. This was a Christmas gift for my grandsons, very disappointed. Review 10: rating 1.0. The signs fell off I had to go out together.:-(should’ve bought the more expensive one Sides fell off together. I wish I had spent the money for the better one.
It’s a fantastic game! Review 11: rating 5.0. Just Buy It! Our friends introduced us to this game and as soon as we got home, we bought it too. It doesn’t require much brain power. Roll the dice, put a penny in coordinating slot, and choose to roll again or pass to the next. It’s a game of luck! We loved being able to hold a conversation all while playing a game. You do have to supply the pennies but other than that it’s a fabulous game! We played this game with a variety of ages all the way down to 5. Review 12: rating 5.0. Family Favorite! W got one for each Family because it's such a favorite with the Grandkids! Review 13: rating 5.0. Family friendly This is a fun easy game for children and adults. We use it at home and I have used it with our Alzheimer’s clients as well in our Respite program. Review 14: rating 5.0. Fun to play We had fun playing this game. Even my autistic daughter enjoyed playing. Brought a lot of entertainment! Review 15: rating 5.0. Fun Game! When I ordered this game I had concerns about the craftsmanship since the name indicated this was the economy version. I was very pleased with the construction of the box I received. The game is very fun and easy to play for children and adults. Review 16: rating 5.0. Easy and fun game. Purchased this after playing the game with brother’s family. It is easy to learn and fun to set up your opponent(s) to lose. Fun for younger ones to learn their numbers. You can use most any coin or very small “poker” chips. Review 17: rating 5.0. Exactly as advertised Ordered one after playing the game with family in Florida. FUN and EASY to play ! Review 18: rating 5.0. Family favorite This game is simple, easy, and fun for all ages, from age 4-adult. It has become a family favorite and I have bought it a number of times as a gift. Review 19: rating 5.0. This is a fun game and is quite easy to learn. We played this on a family vacation. It was fun and easy to learn. We plan to take it on our next cruise and introduce it to new players. Review 20: rating 5.0. Great gift, fun to play I bought these as Xmas gifts, but ended up giving one early. We played it at the beach and loved it. My 6 and 4 year old nephews loved it too. It's great for all ages.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Simple yet a lot of fun I bought this game on a whim because I wanted something different to play. The rules are super simple even for young kids to understand if they know their numbers. My 11 and 9 year old cracked up while we were playing this game because it’s literally the luck of the roll.  I highly recommend giving this game a shot.
